title: goodenia discophora
intro: Goodenia discophora, also known as the "Muddy Goodenia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. This plant is native to Australia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia discophora include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Goodenia discophora can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to be used topically or internally for its medicinal benefits.
